series_metadata.series_title: FILES OF CURRENTLY LICENSED PSYCHOLOGISTS & SCHOOL PSYCHOLOGISTS
series_metadata.series_description: Summary Sheet, Application, Transcript, References, Verification of Supervised Experience.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for 5 years after license expires or 1 year after death, then destroy. ; Microform: For license applications scanned to micofilm cards (license #1--#4450), retain for 5 years after license expires or 1 year after death, then destroy., Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred
